title: Syndromic surveillance: weekly summaries for 2025
body: "The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) collects and analyses health-related syndromic surveillance data and important public health messages, and publishes weekly summaries.  These summaries help GPs and other public health professionals identify trends and prepare for public health threats, like high levels of flu or heat-related illnesses and are published weekly at 14.00 every Thursday.  Weekly summaries for previous years are also available for:   2024 2023 2022 2021 2020 2019 2018 2017 2016 2015 2014  "
